metadata.iteration_notes: Path corrections (.garura/), template moved to shared LTM (core/components/memory/standards/templates/feature-tree-output.md), rules sourced from shared LTM via ltm_rules_feature_catalog_path input. Skill output logic is deterministic and unchanged; outputs reproduced from iteration-1 against identical features.yaml.

expectations.text: Output contains feature AM-F001 on its own row
Every feature row ends with a bracketed status like [released], [rollout], [planned], [development], or [cleanup]
expectations.evidence: 78 feature rows; all end with status bracket=True

expectations.text: No feature row contains '[#' (no feature has an issue field, so the issue slot must be entirely omitted)
Empty capabilities l4-signal-driven and l5-goal-driven render '(no features yet)'
Indentation uses exactly 2 spaces per level (domain col 0, capability col 2, feature col 4)
Output contains no summary line (no 'features_total', no 'Summary:', no total counts rolled up)
Domain and capability rows contain only the slug — no status in brackets on those rows
expectations.evidence: domain rows=5 cap rows=23 all clean of brackets=True

expectations.text: Casual phrasing still triggers the structured tree format (not prose summary)
Output contains the domain slug 'agentic-methodology' as a top-level row
Output contains the domain slug 'engineering-experience' as a top-level row
Status strings appear verbatim in brackets (e.g., [rollout] not [partial], [released] not [live])
Empty capabilities render '(no features yet)'
No prose narration or bullet-list summary wraps the tree
No feature row contains '[#' (issue slot entirely omitted)
No feature row contains '[]' or empty brackets for the issue slot
expectations.evidence: no empty brackets in feature rows

expectations.text: Every feature row ends with a status bracket
expectations.evidence: 78 feature rows; all end with status bracket=True

expectations.text: Features appear in document order from features.yaml (AM-F001 before AM-F002, EO-F001 before EO-F005)
Output is pure tree — no headers, no prose, no totals, no 'Summary:' line
Uses exact 2-space indent per level — not tabs, not 4 spaces, not tree-drawing characters like ├── or └──
Output contains feature AM-F001 on its own row
Every feature row ends with a bracketed status like [released], [rollout], [planned], [development], or [cleanup]
expectations.evidence: 0 feature rows; all end with status bracket=False
